title: Calculation of the chemical potential of hypothetical Van der Waals gases
description: This is a Maple code leading to the calculation of the expression of the chemical potential of Van der Waals gases as functions of pressure and temperature.
author: E-gabrielyan
attribution_md:
Calculation of the chemical potential of hypothetical Van der Waals gases
This is a Maple code leading to the calculation of the expression of the chemical potential of Van der Waals gases as functions of pressure and temperature.
